name: Generic Modular Section
best_for: Self-contained table-based content section at 600px stacked with zero gaps.
notes: 600px table-based block, own top/bottom 32px padding, 24px side padding, declared background color, no external margins. Metadata must declare background color, whether it establishes dermatomyositis (DM), footnote symbols consumed, and whether it contains a CTA. Dark sections must not be adjacent to other dark sections. HEX colors, px sizing, inline CSS, duplicated bgcolor for Outlook.
